REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (434 Clayton Avenue, El Cerrito, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for Debra Dolch, Personal Representative); Debra Dolch (Personal Representative, present in court).

The Court noted for the record that the matter was procedurally in order. After announcement of the sale and a statement of the terms by Mr. Der and there being no overbids, the Court confirmed the sale of the real property commonly known as 434 Clayton Avenue, El Cerrito, California at the return price of $461,500.00, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Right To Sell Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for Debra Dolch, Trustee).

After being advised by counsel that the beneficiary has not received public assistance, the Court granted the Petition, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
